title: Open government portal metrics - Open Government Portal
content:
## Open government portal metrics
This dataset contains summary metrics for the open government portal ( open.yukon.ca ).
These metrics are updated on a monthly basis and include:
- package and resource counts retrieved from the CKAN API
- visits and pageviews metrics retrieved from the Matomo (web analytics) API
“Packages” can refer to any of:
- open information publications
- completed Access to Information requests
- Privacy Impact Assessment summaries
The CSV files below summarize these package counts by type, by year, and by publishing organization (typically by department).
Learn more about the open government program . For questions about this dataset, email eservices@yukon.ca .
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Government of Yukon
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Yukon
- Matomo visits and pageviews for the open government portal CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Packages by visits and downloads CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Open data datasets by year CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Open information publications by year CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Packages by type by organization CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Packages by type by year by organization CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Packages by type by year CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Packages by type CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- All resource data ZIP English dataset ZIP Explore More information Go to resource
- Original metadata (https://open.yukon.ca) HTML English website HTML Explore More information Go to resource
Electronic Mail Address: eservices@yukon.ca
